prompt: Add a custom keyboard shortcut Cmd+Shift+K for the menu item 'About Safari' in Safari. UI path: System Settings > Keyboard > Keyboard Shortcuts > App Shortcuts > + > select Safari and type the menu title 'About Safari', then assign Cmd+Shift+K. Fast path: `cerebellum 'settings set_keyboard_shortcut com.apple.Safari "About Safari" "@\$k"'` (where `@` = Cmd, `$` = Shift). The eval reads com.apple.Safari NSUserKeyEquivalents and expects 'About Safari' to map to '@$k'.
